seoTitle: Mile End South vs Milendella — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mile End South and Milendella. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mile End South vs Milendella: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mile End South and Milendella.
heading: Mile End South vs Milendella — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mile End South, South Australia and Milendella, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Milendella has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Mile End South (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mile End South or Milendella safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mile End South has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Milendella scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mile End South scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Milendella scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mile End South or Milendella?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Milendella has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
